query:
SELECT
                m.id,
                m.channel_id,
                m.user_id,
                m.content,
                m.parent_id,
                m.edited_at,
                m.deleted_at,
                m.created_at,
                u.username as author_username
               FROM message m
               JOIN users u ON u.id = m.user_id
               WHERE m.channel_id = $1
               AND ($2::timestamptz IS NULL OR m.created_at < $2)
               AND m.deleted_at IS NULL
               ORDER BY m.created_at DESC
               LIMIT $3
